creator: Neil.Kefford@airservices.gov.au
text:
When installing 2.2.6 from a CR563 (Matcd) drive, the installer
reports that it cannot mount matcd0c on dist:. The probe finds the drive
successfully (reports as matcdc0). Installing 2.2.5 works correctly
(same machine). Both versions OK when installed from SCSI CD-ROM.

How-To-Repeat: Try installing from CR563 drive.
